seo.title: Inflation Impact Calculator — see what cash quietly costs you
seo.description: Free inflation impact calculator. See how much your cash loses to inflation each year, and what it could become if it worked instead.

hero.headline: What is sitting in cash actually costing you?
hero.subtitle: Inflation eats cash quietly. Here's how much, in your country, over the years that matter.
